global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body and a slightly curved beak. It has a brown-streaked back and a creamy white underbelly with dark streaks. The bird features a distinctive white eyebrow stripe above the eye and a dark brown cap.
discriminative_attributes: Creamy white underbelly with dark streaks

part_details.back: Brown with dark streaks, providing a camouflaged appearance.
part_details.underbelly: Creamy white with prominent dark streaks running longitudinally.
part_details.eyebrow_stripe: Distinctive white line above the eye, contrasting with the darker head.
part_details.cap: Dark brown, covering the top of the head.
part_details.beak: Slightly curved, slender, and pointed, suitable for foraging.

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye, separating the cap from the face.
The dark streaks on the underbelly run parallel along the length of the body.
The beak extends forward from the face, slightly curving downwards.
